consumer_hint: Node v163 release rollback readiness runbook
scope: runtime artifact rollback evidence sample for binary/version, WAL, Snapshot, and fixture version boundaries

artifacts.rollback_boundary: binary rollback changes only mini-kv runtime bits and must be checked against fixture versions before traffic returns
WAL replay can restore mini-kv keys but cannot create Java order authority or repair Java transaction state
snapshot LOAD is a store replacement operation; this sample only inspects LOAD with CHECKJSON and does not execute it
fixtures describe evidence shape and version compatibility; they are not a rollback executor

expected: CHECKJSON LOAD reports store_replace_from_snapshot without executing LOAD
CHECKJSON COMPACT reports wal_rewrite_when_enabled without executing COMPACT
CHECKJSON SETNXEX reports write risks without executing token claim

boundaries: does not run Java or Node
not connected to Java transaction chain
cannot forge Java order authoritative state
production retention and restore policies must be defined outside mini-kv fixture

warnings: WAL/Snapshot rollback cannot create or alter Java order source-of-truth
If evidence conflicts with Java/Node release gate, pause instead of applying rollback
pause_conditions: needs Node to auto-start Java or mini-kv
needs mini-kv in Java transaction consistency chain
rollback target or version compatibility is unclear
